description: Physics, chemistry, biology, mathematics, research and lab-based careers.

careers.name: Physicist
careers.overview: Physicist explores scientific principles through experiments, analysis, data, lab work and research projects.
careers.whyChoose: Physicist is useful because it is ideal for students who enjoy deep subject knowledge, discovery, experimentation and research.
careers.eligibility: Class 12 Science with relevant subjects such as PCM, PCB or PCMB.
careers.educationPath: Class 12 Science -> B.Sc/BS/MS integrated degree -> Research projects -> MSc/PhD or science role.
careers.workEnvironment: Universities, research labs, science institutes, industry R&D teams, analytics units and education organizations.
careers.futureScope: Strong for research, analytics, biotechnology, climate science, space science, education and data-driven work.
careers.aiImpact: AI will support modelling and analysis while scientific reasoning and experimental design remain critical.
cons: Early career may need portfolio or training
